titleStmt.title: SII 9.577: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 577. (A.R. No. 73 of 1912.) ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE PRAKARA IN THE LAKSHMIDEVI TEMPLE AT GORREPALLI, HINDUPUR TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1458, Durmukhi, Māgha, śu. 7, Budhavāra, corresponding to A.D. 1537 January 17, Wednesday, in the reign of Achyutadēva-Mahārāya. It records that, at the suggestion of Virapaṇṇa-Nāyaka of Penugoṇḍe, Kṛishṇapa-Nāyaka, son of Sāṇi Chinnapa-Nāyaka, made a gift of the village, Goravanahaḷḷi, surnamed Lakshmīsāgara, in Guyyalūra-sīme, a sub-division of Rodda-nāḍu which was a district in Penugoṇḍe-rājya, for the service of the goddess, Mahālakshmīdēvi, of Haruhe-Lakkhaṇāpura.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śrīlakhkhaṇāpurīlakṣmyāḥ naivēdyādisamṛddhayē . sāṇi
ciṁnapabhūpālasūnunā kṛṣṇabhūbhujā . penugoṁḍama
(ma)hārājyē guyyalūrasya sīmani . nāmnā gorvanahaḷḷīti grāmaḥ
śrīmān samarpitaḥ . svasti śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśa
kavaruṣaṁgaḷu 1458 neya durmukhisaṁvatsarada māgha śu 7 budhavāra ratha
sapta�vo pu(ṁ)ṇyakāladallū śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśva
ra śrīvīrapratāpa śrīacyutadēvamahārāyaru pṛthvīrājyaṁ
gaivuttiralū . sāṇicinnapanāyakara kumāra kruṣṇappanāyakarū
I Acyutarāyamahārāyaru tamage māgaṇi nāyaka
tanake pālisida penugoṁḍerājya rodanāḍa guyyalūra sīme voḷagaṇa
Aṁtayyana koḍagihaḷḷisthaḷada . muttakadahaḷige māḍalu boṁmagoṁḍana
haḷige teṁkalu koḍagihaḷige paḍuvalu . modheyake baḍagalāda ca
tussīmāsahitavāda nidhi nikṣēpa jala pāṣāṇa Akṣīṇāgāmi sidha sādhya
gaḷeṁba Aṣṭabhōgatējasvāmyadoḍane kūḍida goravanahaḷige pratināmavā
da lakṣmīsāgaraveṁba sarvamānyada grāmavanū penugoṁḍe virapaṁṇayya
navaru bōdhisalāgi haruhelakhkaṇāpurada mahālakṣmīdēviAṁmanavarige
dhūpa dīpa Amṛtapaḍi naivēdya nrutya gīta vādya muṁttāda vaibhavaṁgaḷige ta
mma svāmi Acyutarāyarige puṇyavāgabēkeṁdu sahira(ṁ)ṇyōdakadā
nadhārāpūrvakavāgi Ācaṁdrārkavāgi dhāreneradu koṭṭa goravanahaḷi dharmaśāsana .
Digital edition of SII 9.577 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
